status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
official_name: Department of Industry, Science and Resources
notes: See also registry/regulation/au/gov/industry.json (AI Action Plan) for the regulation-type file under this same namespace. National AI Centre operates within this department.

data.notes: Published by the National AI Centre (within DISR), September 2024. Sets 10 guardrails (accountability, risk management, testing, transparency, human oversight, etc.) for organizations using/developing AI. A companion Proposals Paper outlines a planned mandatory framework for 'high-risk' AI settings, distinct from the already-registered AI Action Plan (secid:regulation/industry.gov.au/ai-action-plan).
